QuickExplore: Interactive Dataset Explorer for SAS and Other Data Formats

Source: R/QuickExplore-package.R
QuickExplore-package.Rd

A 'Shiny' application that provides a SAS Studio-style interface for browsing, exploring, summarising, and converting datasets in SAS (.sas7bdat, .xpt), CSV, and R (.rds) formats.

The main entry point is run_app(). The package also exports several standalone helper functions useful outside the Shiny context:

  • read_dataset() – read any supported format into a data frame.

  • list_datasets() – enumerate datasets in a directory.

  • get_variable_info() – variable-level metadata.

  • compute_numeric_summary() / compute_categorical_summary() – tidy descriptive statistics.

  • format_file_size() – human-readable file size strings.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/ramsas88/QuickExplore,https://ramsas88.github.io/QuickExplore

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/ramsas88/QuickExplore/issues
